shortDescription: A practical course for building a small language model: dataset, tokenizer, baseline, neural LM, evaluation, and generation.
fullDescription: This course guides students through the full workflow of building a small language model: preparing a text dataset, creating a character tokenizer, training a bigram baseline, training a neural character LM, generating text, evaluating models, and building a simple deployment demo. Each lab adds one new idea and saves artifacts that can be checked automatically.
requirements: Basic Python: functions, lists, dictionaries, reading and writing files, and JSON. Basic command-line familiarity is helpful but not required.
